data.title: Mineros S.A. reports record annual revenue of $800 million in 2025, with $42 million returned to investors and a 2026 growth strategy announced.
data.description: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, OTCQX:MNSAF, BVC:MINEROS) announced its financial and operational performance for the quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The figures mentioned are in thousands of US dollars unless specified otherwise. Detailed financial statements and analysis can be found on Mineros' official website.

data.title: Dyson introduces PencilWash™, a slim (1), 38mm wet and dry cleaner, weighing 4.9lbs, with a 1.5in handle for comfort.
data.description: Designed for easy navigation and effective wet cleaning, the latest 38mm PencilWash™ is equipped to handle wet spills and stains efficiently, leaving behind a quick-drying floor finish. Sporting a slim design with a 1.5-inch handle for comfortable grip and convenient storage, this cleaning tool weighs only 4.9lbs, ensuring maximum ease of use.
TOP U.S. COMMANDER FOR LATIN AMERICA MADE AN UNANNOUNCED VISIT TO VENEZUELA FOR MEETINGS WITH SENIOR OFFICIALS, A U.S. OFFICIAL SAID, ACCORDING TO SOURCES.

data.title: Cardinal Infrastructure Group (CDNL) acquired A.L. Grading Contractors for $245.5 million, with ALGC showing $160 million revenue and 26.3% EBITDA margin. Cardinal's estimated 2025 revenue was $452.3-459.7 million, with a record backlog of $678.3 million. 2026 revenue is projected at $664.9-678.3 million with an EBITDA margin of at least 20%. Integration aims to enhance margin and valuation, expanding services into Georgia. CEO Jeremy Spivey praised ALGC's leadership and shared plans for vertical integration and market expansion in Georgia.
data.description: Cardinal Infrastructure Group, Inc. announced the acquisition of A.L. Grading Contractors for $245.5 million, marking their expansion into Georgia. ALGC had unaudited annual revenue of $160 million with a 26.3% Adjusted EBITDA margin for the trailing 12 months. The acquisition is expected to drive growth and margin enhancement through vertical integration. Cardinal's 2025 estimated operating results show 45% revenue growth and a record backlog. Their 2026 guidance forecasts revenue of $664.9 million to $678.3 million with an Adjusted EBITDA margin of at least 20%. Cardinal's CEO, Jeremy Spivey, expressed excitement over the acquisition, emphasizing alignment in values and the company's commitment to growth and innovation in site development. Lee Wood Jr. will remain as President of ALGC, while Benji Wood will be the COO for Cardinal.

data.title: Shareholders can contact Wolf Haldenstein regarding losses in China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS: CLEUF) before March 31, 2026.
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the class action lawsuit against China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS:CLEUF) is March 31, 2026. Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP made the announcement on February 18, 2026, stating that the lawsuit includes significant numbers of individuals seeking legal action against the company.

data.title: Choice Properties REIT reported strong results for 2025, with a distribution increase. Visit their website for details.
data.description: In Toronto today, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) released its financial results for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2025. The Annual Report to Unitholders can be accessed on the Trust’s website at www.choicereit.ca or on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. Choice Properties reported strong operational and financial performance in the fourth quarter and over the course of the year.

data.title: SPY outperformed ACWX for 14 years but now U.S. equities underperform global ex-U.S. stocks by 25%, ACWX up 40%, SPY up 15%.
data.description: For over ten years, the go-to strategy for global investors was to invest in U.S. equities and ignore international markets. From 2011 to early 2025, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) outperformed the iShares MSCI All-Country ex U.S. ETF (NYSE: ACWX) by over 300 percentage points. International diversification was deemed unnecessary. However, a shift occurred in early 2025 when U.S. equities started lagging behind global ex-U.S. stocks by approximately 25 percentage points. ACWX rose by about 40%, while SPY only increased by 15%. Data from Countryetftracker.com shows that the SPY ETF to ACWX ETF ratio is now at levels last seen over two years ago. This significant change may indicate the beginning of a new market trend. Additionally, from a technical standpoint, this shift is even more remarkable. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Abra, CARSTAR, and Fix Auto USA to offer more certified repair options for EV and luxury vehicles.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina, it is emphasized that the choice of collision repair shop is crucial for owners of electric or luxury vehicles. The Driven Brands Collision Group, which oversees popular collision repair brands such as Abra, CARSTAR, and Fix Auto USA, plays a significant role in this aspect. It is highlighted that with the increasing number of electric and luxury vehicles on the road, the expertise of these repair shops is essential to ensure proper repairs.

data.title: Bitcoin's short-term holder stress metric hits 2018 lows, signaling possible market bottom before a 1,900% rally.
data.description: The metric measuring "short-term holder stress" for Bitcoin has decreased significantly, reaching levels last observed in 2018. This indicates that the market may have reached a point of capitulation and potentially hit a bottom.
WHITE HOUSE: TRUMP SIGNS ORDER ON PROMOTING NATIONAL DEFENSE BY ENSURING AN ADEQUATE SUPPLY OF ELEMENTAL PHOSPHORUS AND GLYPHOSATE-BASED HERBICIDES

data.title: Easterly Govt Properties (NYSE: DEA) approves $0.45 quarterly dividend, payable on March 19, 2026 to shareholders, record: March 5, 2026.
data.description: Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA), a real estate investment trust specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to U.S. Government agencies, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per common share. Shareholders of record on March 5, 2026, will receive the dividend on March 19, 2026. Easterly Government Properties concentrates on the acquisition, development, and management of such properties.

data.title: Chiplet Summit announces 2026 winners: Siemens EDA for Packaging: Design & UCIe Consortium for Connectivity and Interoperability.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, the Chiplet Summit, the leading conference for chiplets, announced the winners of the 2026 Best of Show Awards at the Santa Clara Convention Center. The recipients include Siemens EDA for "Packaging: Design," recognized for their Innovator3D IC software facilitating quick planning and diverse integration of ASICs and chiplets through 2.5D and 3D packaging technologies. Additionally, the UCIe Consortium received the award for "Connectivity and Interoperability" for their UCIe 3.0 specification.

data.title: Equinox Gold had a transformative year with a merger, record production, over US$1.1B in debt reduction, and an inaugural dividend.
data.description: Equinox Gold released its preliminary financial and operational outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year closing on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase's lending product now expanded to XRP, DOGE, Cardano, & Litecoin in the U.S., showcasing support for more cryptos.
data.description: One of the leading cryptocurrency exchanges, Coinbase, has announced an expansion of its crypto-backed lending product within the United States. The platform will now offer support for XRP, Dogecoin, Cardano, and Litecoin, in addition to the existing options. This move indicates a significant growth in the lending services provided by Coinbase, catering to a wider range of cryptocurrencies and potentially attracting more users looking to utilize their crypto holdings for loans.
MINISTER LEBLANC SAYS IN THE NEXT FEW WEEKS HE WILL MEET WITH AMBASSADOR GREER TO DISCUSS CUSMA REVIEW

data.title: Brayton Purcell LLP secures nearly $200 million for artificial stone workers affected by silicosis crisis.
data.description: In Novato, California, on February 18, 2026, Brayton Purcell LLP shared that they have achieved nearly $200 million in verdicts and settlements for countertop fabrication employees who have been identified with accelerated silicosis due to the use of crystalline silica artificial stone. This legal victory signifies a significant win for the affected workers and highlights the financial compensation obtained through the firm's efforts.

data.title: MarketWise, Inc. confirms Monument & Cathedral Holdings, LLC withdrew $17.25/share acquisition proposal announced on Oct 29, 2025.
data.description: In Baltimore on Feb. 18, 2026, MarketWise, Inc. (NASDAQ: MKTW) confirmed that Monument & Cathedral Holdings, LLC has retracted its unsolicited non-binding proposal to buy all outstanding securities of the company for $17.25 per share, subject to termination of the Company’s tax receivable agreement. The proposal was initially disclosed on October 29, 2025.

data.title: Austin Transit Partnership chooses Austin Rail Constructors to build Austin Light Rail system, first of its kind, Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2026, the Austin Transit Partnership has chosen Austin Rail Constructors (ARC) as the construction contractor for the city's initial light rail system. The selection of ARC signifies a significant progress in implementing Austin Light Rail.

data.title: Oskaloosa, Iowa will host the Junior League Softball Central Region Tournament for the first time from July 23-29, 2026.
data.description: Oskaloosa, Iowa is set to host the inaugural Junior League Softball Central Region Tournament from July 23 to 29, 2026. This marks the first time the event will be held in the city.
